title: Open Graph Preview — Test Social Media Cards
description: Preview how your URL looks when shared on social media. Test Open Graph meta tags for Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Slack before you post.

schemas.name: Open Graph Preview
schemas.description: Interactive Open Graph preview tool. Preview how your URL will look when shared on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Discord. Generate meta tags instantly.

mainEntity.name: How do I preview my Open Graph tags?

acceptedAnswer.text: Enter your URL in our OG Preview tool above. It fetches and displays your og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url tags, showing a live preview of how your link appears on social media. You can also check with Facebook's Sharing Debugger.

mainEntity.name: What are the required Open Graph tags?

acceptedAnswer.text: The four essential OG tags are: og:title (page title), og:description (page summary), og:image (preview image URL, ideally 1200×630px), and og:url (canonical URL). Also add og:type (usually 'website' or 'article') for completeness.
